question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?

query.sparql: SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE { ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q305683; wdt:P138 ?inventedby. BIND(?inventedby as ?item) SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". } }

question.string: Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?work ?workLabel
WHERE {
  ?author wdt:P800 "Hunter × Hunter".
  ?author wdt:P800 ?work.
  ?work wdt:P50 ?author.
  ?work wdt:P112 ?genre.
  ?work wdt:P1476 ?description.
  ?work wdt:P407 ?language.
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?description), "middle school") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description), "middle-school") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?description), "junior high"))
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
}

}

question.string: Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?university (COUNT(DISTINCT ?founder) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?company wdt:P137  ?founder .
  ?company wdt:P112 ?foundationDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?foundationDate) = 1998) .
  ?company wdt:P161 ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?name, "Tencent")) .
  ?founder wdt:P69 ?education .
  ?education wdt:P69 ?university .
}
GROUP BY ?university
HAVING (?count > 1)

WHERE {

}

question.string: has adam ondra been a winner of IFSC climbing world cup?
has life expectancy in iran grown in any year after 1999?
has population of Isfahan increased at any point after 2006?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?year ?population
WHERE {
  wd:Q193378 wdt:P1082 ?population .
  FILTER (?year > 2006) .
  BIND (YEAR(?date) AS ?year) .
  ?statement ps:P1082 ?population .
  ?statement pq:P585 ?date .
  FILTER (EXISTS { wd:Q193378 wdt:P1082 ?previousPopulation .
                   ?previousStatement ps:P1082 ?previousPopulation .
                   ?previousStatement pq:P585 ?previousDate .
                   FILTER (?previousDate < ?date) .
                   FILTER (?population > ?previousPopulation)
                 })
}

query.sparql:
SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?year) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?shaq awardReceived ?award1 .
  ?kobe awardReceived ?award2 .
  ?award1 award ?allNBA .
  ?award2 award ?allNBA .
  FILTER (?shaq = wd:Q44459) .
  FILTER (?kobe = wd:Q40311) .
  ?award1 year ?year .
  ?award2 year ?year .
  FILTER (?allNBA = wd:Q618352) .
}

question.string: How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?

query.sparql:
SELECT (MAX(?deathToll) AS ?maxDeathToll)
WHERE
{
  wd:Q465068 wdt:P5779 ?startTime .
  wd:Q465068 wdt:P5829 ?endTime .
  FILTER (?startTime < ?endTime) .
  wd:Q465068 p:P1120 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1120 ?deathToll .
  FILTER (DATATYPE(?deathToll) = xsd:integer) .
}

question.string: How often did Naomi Novik win the nebula award?

SELECT ?item ?count WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q12308941 .
  ?item wdt:P1686 wd:Q1048095 .
  ?item wdt:P1686 wd:Q216532 .
  BIND((SUBSTR(STR(?item), 32) AS ?id) .
  BIND((URI(REPLACE(STR(?item), "http://www.wikidata.org/entity/", "")) AS ?uri) .
  BIND((COUNT(?uri) AS ?count) .
  FILTER CONTAINS(STR(?item), "Naomi_Novik") .
} GROUP BY ?item

question.string: How often did the Mongols try to invade Japan?

WHERE {

  ?event wdt:P583 ?endDate .
  ?event wdt:P710 ?mongolEmpire .
  ?event wdt:P706 ?japan .
  ?item wdt:P1344 ?event .
  FILTER(YEAR(?startDate) < 1400) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?endDate) > 1200) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel

question.string: if someone died in 1969, is there any chance they heard of queen’s music?

SELECT ?person ?queenMusic WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P570 ?deathDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?deathDate) = 1969) .
  ?queen wdt:P361 wd:Q1337 .
  ?queen wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?releaseDate) < 1969) .
  ?person wdt:P129 ?occupation .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(str(?occupation), "music")) .
}

query.sparql:
SELECT ?birthYearMerkel ?birthYearBlair WHERE {
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDateMerkel) AS ?birthYearMerkel)
  BIND(YEAR(?birthDateBlair) AS ?birthYearBlair)
  FILTER (?birthYearMerkel = ?birthYearBlair)
  FILTER (?itemMerkel = wd:Q567)
  FILTER (?itemBlair = wd:Q1283)
  BIND(wd:Q567 AS ?itemMerkel)
  BIND(wd:Q1283 AS ?itemBlair)
  BIND(wd:Q567 AS ?item)
  BIND(wd:Q1283 AS ?item2)
  ?item wdt:P569 ?birthDateMerkel .
  ?item2 wdt:P569 ?birthDateBlair .
}

  BIND(YEAR(?voting_rights_end_date) AS ?voting_rights_end)
  ?flintstones wdt:P577 ?flintstones_premiere .
  ?voting_rights wdt:P577 ?voting_rights_end_date .

}

question.string: What event killed the most people in the years 1910 to 1920?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?event ?eventLabel (COUNT(?person) AS ?count)
WHERE
{
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person p:P509 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P509 ?event .
  ?event wdt:P580 ?time .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) >= 1910) .
  FILTER(YEAR(?time) <= 1920) .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?event ?eventLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1

question.string: What are the opposites of zero?
Which businesses are founded by the person in charge of Tesla?
Did Germany have a population growth of at least 1% since 2010?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?population2010 ?populationLatest (ABS(?populationLatest - ?population2010) / ?population2010 * 100 AS ?growthRate)
WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q183 AS ?country)
  ?country wdt:P1082 ?population2010 .
  FILTER(YEAR(?population2010) = 2010)
  ?country wdt:P1082 ?populationLatest .
  FILTER(YEAR(?populationLatest) > 2010)
  FILTER((ABS(?populationLatest - ?population2010) / ?population2010 * 100) >= 1)
}

question.string: Which aircraft did Howard Hughes build?
Which country has more official languages: South Africa (​​Q258) or Ethiopia ?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?country ?count
WHERE {
  VALUES ?country { wd:Q258 wd:Q115 }
  ?country wdt:P37 ?language .
  BIND((SUBSTR(str(?language), 32, 1)) AS ?langCode)
  FILTER(contains(?langCode, "-"))
  BIND((SUBSTR(str(?language), 32)) AS ?langCode1)
  BIND(REPLACE(?langCode1, "-", "") AS ?isoCode)
  FILTER(contains(?isoCode, "^([a-z]{2,3})$"))
  BIND((SUBSTR(str(?language), 1, 31)) AS ?langLabel)
  FILTER(contains(str(?langLabel), "@"))
  BIND(REPLACE(?langLabel, "@", "") AS ?langLabel2)
  FILTER(contains(str(?langLabel2), "^"))
  BIND(REPLACE(str(?langLabel2), "^", "") AS ?cleanLabel)
  BIND((COUNT(DISTINCT ?cleanLabel)) AS ?count)
  }
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

Which genre that Cage the Elephant belongs to has the fewest english characters?
Which takes less space? 1kg of lead or 1kg of iron.

query.sparql:
SELECT ?lead ?iron WHERE {
  BIND(wd:Q1097 AS ?lead) .
  BIND(wd:Q677 AS ?iron) .
  ?lead wdt:P2057 ?leadDensity .
  ?iron wdt:P2057 ?ironDensity .
  BIND((1/?leadDensity) AS ?leadVolume) .
  BIND((1/?ironDensity) AS ?ironVolume) .
  FILTER (?leadVolume < ?ironVolume)
}
